steps.title: Contrast success with uncertainty
steps.content: NASA successfully altered the orbit of a secondary object, but scientists have not yet shown that primary objects such as 2004 DC would be similarly affected. The transition must signal that contrast.

steps.title: Reject similarity and addition cues
steps.content: Choice B introduces an example, Choice C signals similarity, and Choice D adds supporting information. The sentence instead contrasts a demonstrated result with an unproven one. The answer is A.
